text:
The mist parts, revealing two diverging paths carved from the same ruined land. Ahead lies the chapel of thorns — a collapsed spire half-swallowed by vines, its stained glass long melted by past flame. The other path winds north through a crooked archway of fused bone and cinder, where an inverted brazier still burns with a flame that rises downward.

Both radiate a wrongness that settles in the marrow. The kind of wrongness that precedes revelation — or annihilation. You must choose.
lore: The mist between realms was once called 'The Breath of the First Flame.' It guards the path between realities. Only those who carry echoes of broken vows may pass without losing themselves. But not without cost.
